title: Combat Sense
description:
Client-side combat feedback mod, hit or kill markers, camera punch, damage direction indicators, near-miss warnings, and low-health vignette. Compatible with TACZ and vanilla weapons.
纯客户端战斗反馈模组 ——镜头震动、伤害方向指示、近弹警示、。兼容 TACZ 枪械和原版武器。
body:
# A pure client-side combat feedback mod that enhances your PvP and PvE experience with visual and camera effects inspired by modern FPS games.
## Damage Feedback
Damage Direction Indicator — Red arc pointing toward your attacker's direction
Near-Miss Warning — White arc flash when projectiles fly close but miss
### Compatibility
TACZ (Timeless and Classics: Zero) — Full support via native event integration
Vanilla weapons — Swords, axes, tridents, bows, crossbows
LRTactical / Yumc melee weapons — Automatic detection
Pure client-side — no server mod required, works on any server
Supported Versions
Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge
# 纯客户端战斗反馈模组，借鉴现代 FPS 游戏的视觉和镜头效果，提升你的 PvP 和 PvE 体验。
## 受伤反馈
伤害方向指示 — 红色弧形指向攻击者方向
近弹警示 — 子弹擦身而过时白色弧形闪烁
### 兼容性
TACZ（永恒枪械工坊） — 通过原生事件集成完整支持
原版武器 — 剑、斧、三叉戟、弓、弩
LRTactical / Yumc 近战武器 — 自动检测
纯客户端运行，无需服务端模组，可在任何服务器使用
支持版本
Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge
### Video [Bilbili](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1R1dHB4EEG?vd_source=badc55838a05d203c1c774a6667df320)
